en.value: 1.1.1 Establish ISO certified Oxygen generation plant (OGP) with 5 Cylinder for Hospital1.2.1 Provide medical equipment and supplies to hospitals to help contain the outbreak of COVID-19 in Province 1, 2, Bagmati & Lumbini1.2.2 Provide Personal Protective Equipment (PPEs) to frontline healthcare workers for their safety & protection from COVID-191.2.3 COVID-19 care kits for Health Facilities (pulse oximeter, digital thermometer and surgical mask)1.2.4 COVID-19 care kits for home care & monitoring (pulse oximeter, digital thermometer and surgical mask)1.2.5 Procurement & installation of medical equipment and supplies1.2.6 Technical Support to Hospitals for equipment maintenance and repair1.2.7 Transportation and handover of medical equipment and supplies to hospitals2.1.1 Support to isolation centers in government hospitals2.1.2 High focus maternity care for COVID positive pregnant Women (20 ultra-poor pregnant women diagnosed with COVID positive will be provided treatment support and Covid dedicated hospitals will be supported to set up a 5 bed COVID maternity unit with necessary tools and logistic supports)2.1.3 Provision of Public Health Nurses in Covid dedicated hospitals and HFs for continuation of RMNCAH & care of Covid patients2.1.4 Institutional partnership with NMA for continued medical education (CME)2.1.5 COVID commodities forecasting and preparation workshop with department of health services2.1.6 HR support to Management division for COVID related logistic & supply chain management2.2.1 Training to sub provincial level public and private health workforce on public health measures, IPC including health care waste management related to vaccine campaigns2.2.2 Training to Health workers on Mental and Psychological supports2.2.3 Micro-planning on COVID vaccination campaign in 20 municipality of 4 districts2.2.4 Interaction/collaboration with hospitals and HFs for increasing vaccine coverage2.3.1 Critical supplies to maintain and continuation of WASH behavior in HFs2.3.2 Support to schools for implementing safe school protocols (infection prevention and control) linkage with health facility2.4.1 Support to women and adolescents accessing mental health and psychosocial support through training of HWs2.4.2 Support to women, girls and boys for accessing gender-based violence risk mitigation, prevention or response interventions2.4.3 Support to female students accessing formal or non-formal education with learning materials2.4.4 Support to ultra-poor pregnant women and people with disability for sustainable livelihood3.1.1 Organize workshop for action plan development in Province 1, 2 & Bagmati for promotion of vaccination drive and mitigation of wave-3 risks and complications management including risk communication.3.1.2 Conduct Live Phone-in Radio Program for FP Messaging in COVID 19 Context for accessing RMNCH services 3.1.3 Broadcasting message through FM/Radio/TV about equitable access of vaccine and safety concern (through mass media & video on wheel)3.1.4 Support to school children for PHSM behavior change programmes related to COVID-193.1.5 Conduct community- wide awareness campaigns and events to create a positive environment for implementation of public health and social measures (PHSM) and vaccines3.2.1 Orientation to journalists of Province 1 & 2 for Media Engagement on reporting of infodemic and vaccine campaigns3.2.2 Mobilize FCHVs for community engagement actions for social and behavioural change in 20 municipalities of Province 1 & 2.3.2.3 Support/Mobilize volunteers during COVID vaccination at HFs3.2.4 Print/distribute IEC/BCC materials related to Public Health & Social Measure (PHSM) and vaccine promotion & project visibility.3.3.1 Carry out vaccine hesitancy survey at national level among 600 participants3.3.2 Media monitoring report will be prepared and disseminated at national level.3.3.3 Disseminate/publish case study/best practices/lesson learnt including video documentary on positive Role of Social/Religious Leaders in Responding to COVID 19.
